Corseted airship captain gripping brass helm wheel, wind whipping hair, thigh visible through slit skirt, stormy sky through porthole behind her.
Brass-gauntleted mechanic bent over workbench oiling intricate finger joints, corset straining, goggles pushed up, tools scattered in candlelight.
Victorian adventuress crouched reloading ornate steam-rifle, leather corset creaking, brass cartridges between lips, crate shadows concealing her position.
Mad scientist hunched at spark-lit workbench, cybernetic monocle glowing green, corset-clad torso twisted, soldering delicate clockwork with intense focus.
Goggled engineer mid-weld on brass pipe, sparks showering across bare shoulders, leather apron barely covering corseted figure in factory shadows.
Corseted spy picking intricate brass lock, hairpin between teeth, another in gloved fingers, kneeling in gaslit corridor, skirt pooled around boots.
Airship pilot adjusting altitude dial overhead, arm extended, corset stretching, weathered map clutched in other hand, clouds visible through glass dome.
Tesla-coil tinkerer touching live circuit with rubber-gloved hand, electricity arcing blue, goggles reflecting spark, leather bodice tight across ribs.
Brass-armored bounty hunter loading brass cartridges into revolving chamber, thigh holster straps visible, cigarette dangling, dusk airfield behind her.
Clockwork alchemist mixing glowing green potion at cluttered lab table, corset stained with chemicals, brass-ringed fingers steady, steam rising around face.
Victorian duelist wiping blood from brass-edged cutlass blade, corseted chest heaving, torn sleeve revealing shoulder, spent pistol still smoking on table.
Armored mechanic halfway inside exposed airship engine, brass-plated thighs braced against hull, wrench in teeth, oil-streaked cleavage catching lamplight mid-flight.
Telegraph operator leaning over brass console adjusting dials, leather corset straining forward, headphones askew in disheveled hair, urgent coded message incoming.
Parlor inventor sketching complex machine blueprints by candlelight, corset unlaced at desk, brass compass in one hand, ink smudged across collarbone.
Watchmaker adjusting microscopic gear with precision tweezers, magnifying monocle strapped tight, corseted figure hunched intimately over brass clockwork sprawl.
Plague doctor in leather mask sorting vials with brass-tipped fingers, medical corset visible beneath open coat, mechanical stethoscope draped across chest.
Sky-pirate captain smoking pipe while perched on airship rigging, thigh-high boots hooked on rope, wind pressing shirt against corseted torso.
Blacksmith hammering glowing brass at anvil, sparks illuminating sweat-slicked shoulders, leather apron splitting to reveal corset lacings, forge-fire backdrop.
Zeppelin maintenance tech ascending rope ladder beneath hull, brass tool belt riding low on hips, gloved hand reaching, skirt billowing in altitude.
Rail-maintenance engineer kneeling trackside replacing clockwork coupling, grease-smeared corset vest open, brass hammer balanced on exposed thigh, steam hissing.
Cyber-eyed sniper lying prone on slate rooftop, brass scope pressed to glowing ocular implant, corseted silhouette against moonlit smokestacks, finger caressing trigger.
Cartographer bent over brass navigation desk tracing coastline with compass, oil lamp casting shadows across leather-bound chest, maps spilling onto floor.
Flying-pack engineer crouched tightening copper fuel lines on wing-harness, corset visible beneath open vest, goggles dangling, launch platform behind her.
Diver-suit lady sealing brass helmet collar with wrench, Victorian corset beneath rubberized suit, porthole window reflecting her determined expression before descent.
Courier fastening mechanical boot-skates at cobblestone curb, corset laced tight, brass ankle springs gleaming, urgent dispatch tube strapped across shoulders.
Astronomer adjusting massive telescope azimuth, reaching overhead in moonlight, corset silhouette stark against star charts, brass gears clicking into alignment.
Parlor musician tuning ornate brass phonograph-horn, corset pressing against instrument, jeweled fingers adjusting cylinder, velvet curtains framing candlelit scene.
Victorian professor flipping through mechanical encyclopedia pages, clockwork gears turning automatically, corset visible beneath unbuttoned waistcoat, spectacles glinting with reflected text.
Chemist in stained lab-coat pipetting luminous tincture into beaker, corset cinched beneath, brass protective goggles reflecting green glow, ginger cat watching.
Brass-armed swordswoman kneeling in courtyard cleaning blood from Damascus blade, mechanical prosthetic whirring softly, corset rising with heavy breaths, dawn breaking.
Goggled welder straddling brass beam suspended over factory floor, acetylene torch blazing blue, corset silhouette arched backward, sparks cascading down exposed thighs.
Airship navigator braced against tilting deck taking sextant reading, brass instrument raised, wind plastering silk blouse against corseted curves, storm clouds looming.
Copper-limbed machinist reaching into steam engine's exposed gears, mechanical arm elbow-deep, leather corset twisted sideways, condensation beading across shoulders.
Gunslinger at dusty airfield thumbing brass rounds into revolver cylinder, boot propped on crate, corset straps visible through unbuttoned vest, goggles dangling.
Laboratory alchemist tilting beaker of crimson solution toward candlelight, brass-ringed fingers delicate, corset stained purple, glass tubing coiled around workbench.
Rooftop courier fastening messenger harness buckles across corseted torso, brass dispatch cylinder secured, copper boot-springs locked, moonlit skyline stretching behind.
Helmeted diver descending brass ladder into murky water, rubberized suit clinging, Victorian corset visible through porthole window, gloved hand gripping final rung.
Factory mechanic lying beneath boiler adjusting pressure valve overhead, wrench extended, oil-streaked corset riding up, brass pipes hissing steam around her.
Parlor tinkerer winding intricate clockwork automaton key, corset pressing against desk edge, jeweled mechanisms spreading across velvet cloth, concentration furrowing brow.
Telegraph cipher-breaker hunched decoding message at brass terminal, headphones slipping off, corset lacings loosened, frantic fingers adjusting frequency dials as dawn breaks.
Leather-clad machinist straddling exposed gearbox, brass wrench tightening flywheel bolt, corset unlaced at sides, engine grease streaking inner thigh, factory steam swirling.
Goggled aviatrix checking fuel gauge on wing-mounted tank, stretching upward on tiptoes, corset lifting, copper tubes reflecting sunset, wind tugging open collar.
Brass-spined acrobat adjusting mechanical vertebrae calibration, arched backward over mirror, corset hooks straining, exposed shoulder blades gleaming, clockwork spine clicking audibly.
Copper-masked welder cutting through hull plate overhead, torch sparks raining down corseted stomach, leather apron riding high, thighs braced wide against scaffolding.
Victorian locksmith testing skeleton key in vault mechanism, kneeling close, corset pressed against cold brass door, candlelight catching perspiration between shoulder blades.
Pneumatic-armed engineer pumping pressure lever rhythmically, mechanical bicep hissing, corset heaving with effort, gauge needles quivering red, underground boiler room shadows.
Airship rigger coiling brass-clasped rope on deck planking, bent forward, corset lacings straining, wind-blown hair across face, storm lantern swinging beside boots.
Goggles-wearing chemist decanting bubbling amber liquid between flasks, corset buttons undone for breathability, brass fume hood reflecting firelight, lips parted concentrating.
Pistol-packing dispatcher sorting brass message cylinders at pneumatic tube station, corset vest open, cartridge belt slung low, urgent canisters clattering around stocking-clad knees.
Mechanized-leg pilot bracing against cockpit console during turbulence, brass prosthetic locked rigid, corset twisted sideways, free hand gripping throttle, altitude alarms flashing red.
